title: flow-builder inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the flow-builder agent. Missing-required or under-constrained inputs trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

flow_developer_name.description: PascalCase_Underscores developer name. Mirrors the fullName of the .flow-meta.xml.

feature_summary.description: One-line feature prose. At least 10 words — enforced by Gate A word-count rule.

flow_type.description: The Flow processType family. Drives the <processType> tag + <start> block.

trigger_sobject.description: SObject the flow triggers on. Required when flow_type=record-triggered or platform-event-triggered.

trigger_context.description: Trigger timing inside the flow. Inferred from flow_type when absent.

expected_volume.description: Record-volume sizing hint that drives governor-limit and LDV recommendations. One of: `small`, `medium`, `high`. Defaults to `medium`.

referenced_fields.description: Fully-qualified Object.Field names the flow reads/writes. Gate B validates each against the org stub.

subflows.description: DeveloperNames of subflows this flow invokes. Each must exist at repo or org.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of a real org Gate C can deploy-validate against. When absent, Gate C runs static-only.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./force-app`.
